description_long: This wheelchair features a sturdy, light-gray tubular metal frame with prominent cross-bracing beneath the seat for added stability. The seat and backrest are made of a black, fabric-like material, providing a comfortable sitting surface. The armrests are padded and finished in a textured dark gray, with a cup holder and a small red button visible on the right armrest. The wheelchair is equipped with four wheels: two larger rear wheels and two smaller front caster wheels, all in a solid, non-spoked design with pink accents on the wheel covers and footrests. The footrests are curved, fixed, and integrated into the frame, also highlighted in pink. The push handles at the back are standard, straight, and extend upward, matching the frame's light-gray color.
description: A modern wheelchair with a light-gray tubular frame, black fabric seat, pink-accented solid wheels, and padded armrests with cup holder and button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide black seat, padded armrests, pink footrests, and the solid front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tubular frame, cross-bracing, and the curved pink footrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest, push handles, and the rear wheels' solid design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cup holder, red button on the armrest, and the pink-accented footrest.
attribute_wheel_type: Solid wheels, four in total: two larger rear wheels and two smaller front caster wheels, all with smooth, non-spoked, pink-accented covers.
attribute_frame_design: Folding frame with tubular aluminum construction, cross-bracing under the seat, and straight geometry for strength and portability.
attribute_footrest_style: Fixed, curved footrests integrated into the frame, medium-sized, with pink accent color.
attribute_handlebar_configuration: Standard straight push handles, light gray, extending vertically from the rear of the frame.
